note: Views Jump Menu provides a single Views style plugin (id `jump_menu`) that renders rows as a <select> dropdown navigating to each row's URL. It has no admin form, permissions, services, or Drush. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) — they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with Views Jump Menu, how do I make a view render its results as a jump-menu dropdown? Name the Views plugin type and the plugin id.
evals.expected_output: It is a Views style (format) plugin with id `jump_menu` (class JumpMenu extends StylePluginBase). Set the display's Format to Jump Menu; the display must use the Fields row style.

evals.prompt: Which two style options must I set so the Views Jump Menu shows text and links somewhere when an option is chosen?
evals.expected_output: Set `label_field` (the field whose text is each option's label) and `url_field` (the field providing each option's destination URL). No options render until label_field is set.

evals.prompt: Where is the admin settings page for Views Jump Menu and what permission controls it?
evals.expected_output: There is none — no configure route, no settings form, and no permissions. All configuration is per-view in the display's Format (style) options.

evals.prompt: How do I make the Views Jump Menu open the selected destination in a new browser tab?
evals.expected_output: Enable the `new_window` style option ("Open link in new window"). The JS then calls window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener') instead of setting window.location.

evals.prompt: In Views Jump Menu, when does each option link to the entity's canonical aliased URL versus the field's rendered value?
evals.expected_output: When the chosen URL field is an unaltered EntityLink handler, preprocess uses getEntity($row)->toUrl('canonical'); if the field text has been rewritten (alter_text), it uses the field's rendered output instead.

evals.prompt: I want to override the HTML markup of the Views Jump Menu select. Which theme hook / template do I copy?
evals.expected_output: Override the `views_jump_menu` theme hook by copying templates/views-jump-menu.html.twig into your theme. It renders a <select> with a placeholder option and one <option data-url=...> per row.

evals.prompt: Which Views Jump Menu options set the placeholder prompt text and the screen-reader label of the dropdown?
evals.expected_output: `select_text` sets the pre-selected first option's text (default '-- Select --'); `select_label` sets the <select> aria-label for accessibility.

evals.prompt: What does the Views Jump Menu module depend on, and does it require any contrib modules or libraries?
evals.expected_output: It depends only on core `views` (drupal:views). No other contrib modules, PHP libraries, or external dependencies; license GPL-2.0-or-later.
